@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
actor "Claims Manager" as ClaimsManager

[Customer Self-Service] as CustomerSelfService <<service>>
[Claim Management] as ClaimManagement <<service>>
[Document Management] as DocumentManagement <<service>>
[Policy Validation] as PolicyValidation <<service>>
[Fraud Detection] as FraudDetection <<service>>
[Claim Adjudication] as ClaimAdjudication <<service>>
[Payment Routing] as PaymentRouting <<service>>

[Payment Gateway] as PaymentGateway <<external>>

Customer --> CustomerSelfService : "Submit Claim, Track Status"
CustomerSelfService --> DocumentManagement : "Upload Documents"
CustomerSelfService --> ClaimManagement : "Submits Claim, Queries Status"

ClaimsManager --> ClaimManagement : "Reviews Flagged Claims"

ClaimManagement --> PolicyValidation : "Validates Policy Eligibility"
ClaimManagement --> FraudDetection : "Detects Potential Fraud"
ClaimManagement --> ClaimAdjudication : "Adjudicates Claim"
ClaimManagement --> PaymentRouting : "Initiates Payment"

PaymentRouting --> PaymentGateway : "Routes Payment"
@enduml

a0a751b1b28a5e71e06a7f55129c929f.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
participant "Claim Submission" as ClaimSubmission
participant "Document Management" as DocumentManagement
participant "Claim Processing" as ClaimProcessing
participant "Payment Routing" as PaymentRouting
external_system "Payment Gateway" as PaymentGateway
participant "Claim Status Tracking" as ClaimStatusTracking

group Claim Submission and Processing
    Customer -> ClaimSubmission: Submit Claim Request
    activate ClaimSubmission
    ClaimSubmission -> DocumentManagement: Upload Documents
    DocumentManagement --> ClaimSubmission: Documents Stored
    ClaimSubmission -> ClaimProcessing: Initiate Claim Evaluation
    deactivate ClaimSubmission
    activate ClaimProcessing
    ClaimProcessing -> ClaimStatusTracking: Update Status (Submitted)
    ClaimProcessing -> ClaimProcessing: Evaluate Claim (Policy, Fraud, Settlement)
    ClaimProcessing -> PaymentRouting: Request Payment
    PaymentRouting -> PaymentGateway: Process Payment
    activate PaymentGateway
    PaymentGateway --> PaymentRouting: Payment Confirmation
    deactivate PaymentGateway
    PaymentRouting --> ClaimProcessing: Payment Processed
    ClaimProcessing -> ClaimStatusTracking: Update Status (Paid)
    ClaimProcessing --> Customer: Claim Paid Notification
    deactivate ClaimProcessing
end

group Claim Status Tracking
    Customer -> ClaimStatusTracking: Query Claim Status
    ClaimStatusTracking --> Customer: Display Status
end
@enduml

c3bed9f18cdb8544df5af71d9a2ccd64.fixed_content:
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
participant "Customer Dashboard" as Dashboard
participant "Claim Submission" as ClaimSubmission
participant "Document Management" as DocumentManagement
participant "Claim Evaluation" as ClaimEvaluation
participant "Claim Review" as ClaimReview
participant "Claim Settlement" as ClaimSettlement
participant "Payment Processing" as PaymentProcessing
actor "Claims Manager" as ClaimsManager
external_system "Payment Gateway" as PaymentGateway

Customer -> ClaimSubmission : Submit Claim Details
activate ClaimSubmission
ClaimSubmission -> DocumentManagement : Request Document Upload Link
activate DocumentManagement
DocumentManagement --> ClaimSubmission : Upload Link Provided
deactivate DocumentManagement
Customer -> DocumentManagement : Upload Supporting Documents
activate DocumentManagement
DocumentManagement --> Customer : Documents Uploaded Confirmation
deactivate DocumentManagement
ClaimSubmission -> ClaimEvaluation : Initiate Claim Processing (Details, Docs)
deactivate ClaimSubmission
activate ClaimEvaluation

opt Claim requires review
    ClaimEvaluation -> ClaimReview : Flag Claim for Review
    activate ClaimReview
    ClaimsManager -> ClaimReview : Review Claim
    ClaimReview --> ClaimEvaluation : Claim Reviewed (Approved/Rejected)
    deactivate ClaimReview
end

ClaimEvaluation -> ClaimSettlement : Request Settlement Calculation
deactivate ClaimEvaluation
activate ClaimSettlement
ClaimSettlement --> ClaimEvaluation : Settlement Amount Calculated
deactivate ClaimSettlement
activate ClaimEvaluation
ClaimEvaluation -> PaymentProcessing : Authorize Payment (Amount)
deactivate ClaimEvaluation
activate PaymentProcessing
PaymentProcessing -> PaymentGateway : Process Payment Request
activate PaymentGateway
PaymentGateway --> PaymentProcessing : Payment Confirmation
deactivate PaymentGateway
PaymentProcessing --> Customer : Payment Confirmation
deactivate PaymentProcessing

ClaimEvaluation -> Dashboard : Update Claim Status (Approved/Settled)
activate Dashboard
Dashboard --> Customer : Display Status Update
deactivate Dashboard

Customer -> Dashboard : View Claim Status / Download Report
activate Dashboard
Dashboard --> Customer : Display Claim Details / Report
deactivate Dashboard
@enduml
